title: implement podman image scp
body:
with podman 4.2.0 podman image scp now has a remote endpoint. Add support for a function
that takes 3 arguments: source, dest(optional) and quiet(optional)

resolves #198

Signed-off-by: Charlie Doern <cdoern@redhat.com>
